steps.title: Add a second point
steps.content: The previous sentence says Santos's photograph fuels Reyes's exploration of love and cultural identity. The next sentence makes another point about the same poem: by responding to the photograph, the poem also reflects on poetry's relationship to other art forms.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched signals
steps.content:
• Choice A, Conversely, signals contrast, but the two ideas are compatible.
  • Choice C, For instance, would introduce an example, but the second idea is not an example of love and identity.
  • Choice D, In other words, signals restatement, but the second idea is new.

steps.title: Signal addition
steps.content: Choice B, What's more, correctly signals that the sentence is adding a complementary observation. The poem explores love and cultural identity, and it also reflects on the relationship between poetry and other art forms. The answer is B.
